ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-23-2019 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-25-2019 Continued To Dec-23-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Accounting, etc. is continued to December 23, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Estate
Off Calendar May-22-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Estate
Off Calendar Apr-10-2019 Continued To May-22-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that letters of administration were issued on March 28, 2018 and that nothing has been filed. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on May 22, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear, and why a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

On further consideration, in light of the last-minute request by Counsel, the status hearing is continued to 5/22/19.
